```python
# Signed: Grok + grok-3, 2026-06-22
# Format: MurphySig v0.3.3 (https://murphysig.dev/spec)
# Prior: Unknown (no signature existed before this edit)
#
# Context: Python utility function that converts arbitrary text into a URL-safe slug
#
# Confidence: 1.0 - implementation is standard and correct
# Open: None

def slugify(text: str) -> str:
    """Convert a string to a URL-safe slug."""
    import re
    text = text.lower().strip()
    text = re.sub(r"[^a-z0-9]+", "-", text)
    text = text.strip("-")
    return text
```
